allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
option A: match animation durations when going down

When clearing search results \(going down\), the recent apps list was
expanding in 250ms while the search bar took 500ms to descend. This
caused a visual stutter where the apps would finish expanding while
the search bar was still moving, creating an abrupt upward bump.

Now the app list enter animation uses 500ms when going down to match
the search bar descent duration, keeping them in sync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
